title: Insolvency practitioner sanctions: Muhammad Usman Nazir 20 March 2025
body: "This order is made in relation to complaints that Mr Nazir, in his capacity as Liquidator, failed to conduct his investigations in accordance with:  a) Paragraph 8 of Statement of Insolvency Practice 2 effective from 6 April 2016; and / or  b) Paragraph 9 of Statement of Insolvency Practice 2 effective from 6 April 2016.  This was in breach of R2103.1 b) of the fundamental principle of professional competence and due care, as set out in the Insolvency Code of Ethics (effective from 1 May 2020).  Mr Muhammad Nazir is therefore liable to disciplinary action under Disciplinary Bye-Law4.1b "
